examples: The scapula is a triangular bone.
To increase the shoulder range of motion, one must treat the scapula first.
Scapula retraction is a fancy way of saying to squeeze your shoulder blades together.
He showed me the scapula of an aurochs, an extinct forebear of domestic cattle, weighing more than two thousand pounds.
Curtains was licking the sweat from his scapula.
